changes_made: Increased sampling frequency: every 5 trading days instead of 21 (900→3800 samples)
Fixed sentiment_pct: now uses momentum-based proxy with noise instead of constant 50
Fixed sector_composite: now uses relative performance proxy with noise instead of constant 50
Removed constant features from active set (above_ma200 also dropped - always 1 in bull)
Added 8 engineered features: rsi_x_regime_bull, momentum_proxy, value_momentum, tech_x_growth, rsi_oversold, rsi_overbought, above_ma200, score_rank
Tuned XGBoost: n_estimators=200, max_depth=5, lr=0.05, min_child_weight=3
remaining_notes: market_regime_bear is inherently 0 during bull markets - expected
above_ma200 dropped to 0 importance - most stocks above MA200 in bull market
Precision decreased (0.68→0.56) as trade-off for much better recall
With real snapshot data (30+ days), model should improve further
LightGBM not tested (not installed) - potential further improvement
